title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
input_format: An integer array `nums` and an integer `target`.
output_format: The index of `target` if it is in `nums`, or `-1` if it is not in `nums`.
constraints:
- `1 <= nums.length <= 5000`
- `-10^4 <= nums[i] <= 10^4`
- All values of `nums` are unique.
- `nums` is an ascending array that is possibly rotated.
- `-10^4 <= target <= 10^4`
function_signature: function search(nums: number[], target: number): number {}
